details: The agent successfully navigated to all three sites and extracted correct information: (1) Wikipedia - correctly identified Graydon Hoare as the creator of Rust, (2) GitHub - reported 112k stars which confirms 100k+ stars, (3) rust-lang.org - retrieved the exact tagline 'A language empowering everyone to build reliable and efficient software.' All three sites were visited with actual browser automation tool calls, and the extracted data matches the known facts.
